title: lotus procumbens
intro: Lotus procumbens, also known as the creeping lotus, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Asia, characterized by its long, creeping stems and small, white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of lotus procumbens include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting liver and kidney health, making it a valuable herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of lotus procumbens typically include drying the roots and leaves to make teas, infusions, or capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
